title: Faithful 64x Detail Armor Bar Reconstructed
description: Faithful 64x Detail Armor Bar resource pack compatibility ❗ Copper Armor is now compatible ❗
body:
# [Faithful 64x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-64x/versions) with [Detail Armor Bar Reconstructed](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar-reconstructed) Compatibility Resource Pack.
### 📜 About
> caiosx22 here, and this pack is a 64x version of [Detail Armor Bar Reconstructed](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar-reconstructed), based on [Faithful 64x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-64x/versions). The thing is, I **only** managed to make it **work perfectly on 1.21.5+**. That's why this pack is meant to work with [Detail Armor Bar Reconstructed](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar-reconstructed) mod instead of [Detail Armor Bar](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar) too.

### ⚠️ Compatibility
- ✅ Any version of [Detail Armor Bar Reconstructed](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar-reconstructed) Mod
- ❌ [Detail Armor Bar](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar) Mod

### 🗨️ Contact
> My Discord DM -> caiosm1
